---
title: "Miscellaneous"
format: html
---

**Current read:** *The Wager,* David Grann

**Other 2026 reads:**

-   *The Vegetarian*, Han Kang
-   *Katabasis*, R. F. Kuang
-   *The Metamorphosis*, Franz Kafka

**Miscellaneous Gems**

![](media/misc/mimi_tucked.jpeg){fig-align="left" width="45%"}

![](media/misc/canyon_creek.jpeg){fig-align="right" width="45%"}

![](media/misc/fl_sunset.jpeg){width="45%"}

![](media/misc/osiris.jpeg){fig-align="right" width="45%"}
